art_direction: Luxury nocturnal crystal atelier: deep indigo glass, iridescent cyan-violet-coral highlights, editorial spacing, restrained motion, and high-legibility mobile surfaces.

assets.prompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: portrait mobile game background artwork. Primary request: create an original, premium abstract backdrop for a luxury block puzzle game; a deep midnight-indigo crystalline world with luminous aurora ribbons, soft pearlescent glass forms, tiny floating prism dust, and restrained celestial glow. Scene/backdrop: immersive vertical atmosphere with layered depth, darker quiet center for a game board, richer decorative energy around the outer edges and upper corners. Style/medium: high-end stylized 3D editorial game art, polished glassmorphism, silky volumetric lighting, subtle film grain, elegant and sophisticated rather than childish. Composition/framing: portrait 9:16 mobile wallpaper; no interface, no game board, no blocks; calm negative space through the central 60 percent; decorative light concentrated near edges; seamless crop-safe composition. Lighting/mood: nocturnal, mesmerizing, serene, premium; cyan, violet, electric coral and champagne highlights over a navy-black base. Materials/textures: frosted crystal, iridescent glass, satin haze, microscopic sparkling dust. Constraints: entirely original; no text; no logo; no watermark; no recognizable brand assets; no game UI; no grids; no hard frame; maintain strong legibility for white UI layered above. Avoid: cartoon characters, flat vector style, busy central focal point, neon cyberpunk signage, lens flare overuse, literal space planets.
assets.rights_note: Generated specifically for this original project with the built-in image generation tool; intended for distribution with the game under the applicable OpenAI service terms.
assets.modifications: The generated 941x1672 PNG was encoded locally to a 112 KB WebP at quality 86 for the runtime; the PNG is retained as the documented source and fallback.

assets.prompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: seamless tileable game material texture for small glossy puzzle blocks. Primary request: luminous pearlescent opal with milky translucent depth, subtle cyan, lavender and rose fire, delicate flowing mineral bands and tiny crystalline inclusions. Style/medium: premium stylized 3D material reference, polished luxury mobile game surface. Composition/framing: orthographic square texture, edge-to-edge, uniform detail density, no central focal point. Lighting/mood: soft internal iridescence, controlled highlights, readable even when cropped into very small squares. Materials/textures: natural opal, mother-of-pearl, translucent mineral layers. Constraints: seamless repeat on all four edges; no objects; no frame; no text; no logo; no watermark; no cast shadows; no perspective; no recognizable brand assets. Avoid: large gemstones, jewelry, dark empty patches, hard directional lighting.
assets.rights_note: Generated specifically for this original project with the built-in image generation tool; intended for distribution with the game under the applicable OpenAI service terms.
assets.modifications: The 1254x1254 generated PNG is retained as source and was resized to 1024x1024 then encoded to WebP at quality 84 for runtime use.

assets.prompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: seamless tileable game material texture for small glossy puzzle blocks. Primary request: molten solar glass with glowing champagne-gold and coral magma veins running through polished deep amber crystal, fine ember specks and controlled heat shimmer. Composition/framing: orthographic square texture, edge-to-edge, uniform micro-detail, no central focal point. Lighting/mood: radiant inner warmth with crisp gold highlights, dramatic but readable on tiny mobile tiles. Materials/textures: polished volcanic glass, liquid gold filaments, microscopic embers. Constraints: seamless repeat on all four edges; no objects; no frame; no text; no logo; no watermark; no cast shadows; no perspective; no recognizable brand assets. Avoid: realistic flames, large cracks, black empty regions, cartoon lava.

assets.prompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: seamless tileable game material texture for small glossy puzzle blocks. Primary request: cosmic obsidian velvet with deep indigo and midnight-violet mineral grain, very fine silver and cyan star flecks, subtle topographic waves and hairline luminous fissures. Style/medium: premium stylized 3D material reference, sophisticated nocturnal luxury game surface. Composition/framing: orthographic square texture, edge-to-edge, uniform fine detail, no central focal point. Lighting/mood: mysterious restrained inner glow, high clarity when cropped into tiny squares. Materials/textures: polished obsidian, velvet mineral grain, microscopic stardust. Constraints: seamless repeat on all four edges; no objects; no frame; no text; no logo; no watermark; no cast shadows; no perspective; no recognizable brand assets. Avoid: literal planets, galaxies with large focal centers, near-black featureless areas, noisy glitter.

assets.kind: vector app icon and raster derivatives
assets.modifications: Original SVG mark rasterized locally at 192x192 and 512x512 for mobile installation metadata.

assets.kind: procedural CSS material and VFX system
assets.modifications: Five authored color palettes combine with four evolving material families, specular layers, shadows, glows, board-wide shockwaves, sparks, and reduced-motion fallbacks.

used_for: welcome, pause, result, and settings flows
assets.modifications: Authored as a responsive HTML layer with safe-area handling, roving board focus, touch targets, and high-contrast/reduced-motion modes.
